data.description:
## What
Collapse the two ad-hoc inline "="-splitting parsers into the central Config: src/rebar/_engine_support/lookups.py::_display_mode (ticket.display_mode) and src/rebar/_commands/txn.py verify-gate loop (verify.*).

## CRITICAL
Preserve the fail-closed verify gate (txn.py:239-270): present-but-unreadable verify.* => require signature; absent => gate off.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Both inline parsers removed; reads go through Config
- [ ] Regression test: present-but-unparseable verify config => require_sig=True; absent => gate off
- [ ] Full non-integration suite green
Blocked by the typed-Config task.
data.title: Route all config reads through Config; retire both inline parsers; preserve fail-closed gate
